programmes.show_description: This is CBBC! Tune every day from 7.00am.
Picture Perfect. Animated series. After completing all his chores Bitzer sees a wonky picture that just won't hang straight.
Big Penfold. Animated series. The world is in jeopardy and the only thing that can save it is a 1,000ft Penfold.
Pocket Beasts. Twinkle uses her excellent pocket beast card skills when on a quest to rescue the missing Council of Happiness from Grackle the Giant.

programmes.show_name: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programmes.show_description: Cat Walkers. With Boy's new help-for-hire business booming, he overworks his unpaid employee, Dog, without realizing. Girl sets out to teach Dog a lesson about standing up for himself.

programmes.show_name: Grizzy and the Lemmings: World Tour
programmes.show_description: Sandbox Games. The Lemmings find a futuristic underground site.
High Sea Diving. SpongeBob dives up to the surface.
Moustache Confidential. The Odd Squad investigate strange events. When Agent Obfusco's moustache is stolen, it's up to Olive and Otto to get it back.
Things Get Chilli. With Paul on vacation, Pieface falls under the influence of a fiery chilli pepper and unexpectedly turns rogue.
Ice Creamers. It's ice cream for everyone when Danny and Mick take on an ice cream van!
You Could Teleport? Is it really possible to teleport? Spoiler alert: it could end in disaster!
...Olds: Science: Classifying Living Things. Learn about Carl Linnaeus, animals, plants, microorganisms, vertebrates and invertebrates.
Episode 28. Epic experiments and science tricks, with a rocket race, stargazing and delivery robots!
Beastly Bodily Functions Special. Doctors Chris and Xand van Tulleken join Rattus for a selection of old and new sketches relating to bodies.
Day of the Gossip. While looking after Gav's cat and Sarah's guinea pig, Ricky gets bitten and suddenly he can hear the pets talking! Not only that, they're gossiping about him.
Venom. Wildlife series. Steve is spat at and bitten by scorpions, spiders and snakes in his quest to prove that venom is one of the most lethal weapons of the animal kingdom.
You're Mostly Made of Water! Find out why the human body is mostly made of water as the doctors investigate the hypothalamus, the amazing part of your brain that keeps you hydrated.
Elsie Widdowson. Dick and Dom reveal the genius of food expert Elsie Widdowson, who helped to devise wartime rationing. Under her diet, Britain was the healthiest it had ever been.
Here Boy! Odd Sock Alana needs help with her disobedient French poodle, Monty. Andy and the Band try to train the pup, but their canine class is decidedly dog-eared.
Gladiators Revenge on Nitro! The Gladiators get their own back on Nitro in an epic prank full of pie pandemonium!
Octonauts and Operation Cooperation. Preschool animation. After Shellington crashes the Gup-D, he and Kwazii team up with a moray eel and grouper fish to pick up the pieces.
All About Coral. Big Lizard and Cosima release an underwater vent, causing the coral to turn white!
Rumble on the Radio. Brinicle invites Pancake onto his radio show but is cross when his accidental burps prove a hit. Pancake soon discovers that fame as 'burping guy' has its downsides.
The Forest Inspectors. Forest inspectors pay the forest a visit to check its super-happy status. Friendlyface sends the heroes on outlandish quests to guarantee results.
Snow Day. When the heroes wake up on Snow Day morning, there isn't a snowflake in sight! The heroes must quest to free the Snow Dragon and save Snow Day for all.
Ninja Pong. Coach is in need of a ping-pong player for a charity competition.
Taking Care of Business. Reality-style drama following the lives of a group of dancers at the Next Step Dance Studio. Jiley is reunited! But the team has lost a member.
The Best Friend. Jo causes chaos when she tells Celeste's mother that Celeste doesn't want to return home.
Picnic 'n' Mix. Wes has a decision to make when a foster family offers him a home. Does he leave the DG?
Pizza. Duck has to deliver pizzas around the town, but he hasn't reckoned with the lengths that Frog will go to to get them all for himself.
Duck! Animated series. Shaun and the flock discover that a pair of nesting ducks have stolen their bedding to make a comfy new home up on top of Bitzer's kennel.
Never-Ending Weekend. Dennis and the gang convince Mrs Creecher that Monday is actually Sunday in the hope of extending their weekend.
The Very Important Unicorn. While questing to keep her hero safe on her long journey, superfan Blossom fusses and frets too much, making things awkward.

programmes.show_name: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programmes.show_description: The Alien. After Cheese hears that the town has been invaded by an alien, the kids decide to investigate. Girl is sceptical until she starts believing that she is turning into an alien.

programmes.show_name: Grizzy and the Lemmings: World Tour
programmes.show_description: Lemming Fortune. The Lemmings discover a box filled with fortune cookies close to the Great Wall of China.

Plankton Paranoia. Plankton hasn't tried to steal the formula in a while...
Toy Scary Boo. Toys come to life in the local shopping mall, and the gang stays overnight to investigate.
Miss Information. Captain O must take on Villain News, who are spreading lies about Odd Squad.
Driver's Ed. Robin is inadvertently the getaway driver for a bank robbery.
Charcadet's Wish! Liko, Zirc and Onia find Amethio living on a deserted island.

programmes.show_description: Pirates in Sight. The Lemmings play pirates on a beached boat.

Choose Your Weapons. The heroes reveal their weapons and battle a super robot.
Meet Hacker T Dog. Get to know Hacker T Dog as he gives an access-all-areas tour of his hometown of Wigan!

programmes.show_name: Grizzy and the Lemmings: World Tour
programmes.show_description: Chocolate Deposit. The Lemmings find a magic stick that functions as a Yummy divining rod.
Bottle Burglars. SpongeBob and Squidward let Plankton steal the secret formula.
Disorder in the Court, Part 1. The Odd Squad investigate strange events. In this two-part episode, Olive is put on trial for causing oddness.
Spud-U-Love. Paul the Potato is love-struck by the poster girl potato advertising WilburCorp's new line of super-posh chips. The gang stage a daring potato rescue in the WilburCorp factory.
Piano Plonkers. Danny and Mick need to move a piano to the upstairs studio!
You Took All the Water Out of the Sea? Empty the oceans and you'd see hidden wonders, but you'd also cause the end of the world.
...Science: Seasons and Weather. Learn about the four seasons, weather and daytime.
Episode 29. Owain and Tilly discover the science behind floating, go with the flow for a perfectly balanced trick, try a circular illusion, and find out how not to fold under pressure!
Bewitching Books. Comedian and children's author Rosie Jones is here to help Rattus choose his World Book Day outfit, and discover the gory details behind some favourite children's books!
Bugged Out. The Kwapongs make a bug jungle, Chris Howarth makes sand art waves, and Rob Biddulph shows how to draw a furry monster!
Rot Box Investigation. A team of young science detectives investigate rot and decay through a series of experiments and activities, assisted by Dr George McGavin.
Staggering Storytellers. A special episode of the historical sketch show, taking a look at some of literature's greatest works and history's wackiest writers.

programmes.show_name: New: World Book Day 2026 - Live Lesson
programmes.show_description: Join Joel M and Vick Hope on a journey to discover that there is more than one way to be a reader. Follow the map, explore reading vibes and choose books that spark your feelings.
Da Vinci. Dick and Dom reveal the genius of artist and inventor Leonardo da Vinci and are inspired to come up with their own brilliant idea.
Mako Shark. Steve Backshall learns about sharks. Steve snorkels alongside mako sharks off the coast of San Diego in California and gets under their skin in his shark lab.
Too Many Cooks. Odd Sock Mimi needs help to run her café as there is a mystery reviewer! Andy cooks up a storm in the kitchen, but Cousin Mac's new invention may not be a recipe for success!
Children in Need Special. Nitro goes undercover for a special Children in Need prank on Apollo and recruits Sabre, Alfie Watts and Pudsey to help.
Octonauts and the Bomber Worms. Preschool animation. While diving down to the Midnight Zone, the Octonauts are attacked by bomber worms and have to rescue an injured colleague.
The Vegetable Robbery! When their garden vegetables are stolen, Cosima and Big Lizard become detectives.
Slimy Sammy. Flutter buys a new fishy pet from slippery salesman Mervyn, but the Piripenguins get stuck in its gloopy slime. Can the friends find a solution to their sticky situation?
Spiky Trevor. Trevor accidentally spikes himself on a cactus while questing and discovers that being covered in spikes has given him a unique superpower.
The Merhaven Song Contest. The heroes quest to collect bath sponges from Merhaven, but Hoofius decides to enter the annual Merhaven Song Contest, causing mayhem in Merhaven.
The Pre-Hysteric Race. Keen to join a race with her classmates, a cavegirl orders a tame T-rex from the Ninjas. But they must work together with her teacher to train the unruly dinosaur.
The Edge of Glory. Reality-style drama series. The team prepares to leave for regionals. Cassie is made the alternate dancer but still tries to help the team.
The Photo. Alicia and Darrell find themselves trapped on the day of Irene's big concert.
The Red Jersey. Fumi dreams of moving up a level and securing herself a red jersey, but it's not going to be easy. Joey takes on coaching duties while out with a broken arm.
Greenfinger. Animated series. Danger Mouse's attempts at gardening lead to a gigantic Welsh space plant taking over the world and an attack of intergalactic bees.
The Stare. Animated series. Bitzer gets his wish for some peace and quiet when Shaun becomes hypnotised by Mowermouth the goat and finally stops bothering him.
Be More Dog. Dennis can't get Grizzly's new animal training method to work on a wilful Gnasher.
Pocket Beasts. Twinkle uses her excellent pocket beast card skills when on a quest to rescue the missing Council of Happiness from Grackle the Giant.

programmes.show_description: Spoiler Alert. In order to avoid him spoiling the new Captain Callisto movie, the siblings have to be Gherkin's servants for a week.

Factory. Frog creates chaos in a loo roll factory, leaving Duck covered in toilet paper. Duck just wants to fix the machine, but Frog is convinced he's a spooky mummy!
Call the Cops! Plankton goes to jail, and the secret formula is taken as evidence!
Lights! Camera! Mayhem! The gang visits the set of a spy movie and encounters the ghost of a teen idol.
A Dicey Situation. Over a board game, Captain O takes Ozzie and Orli back to her time at sea with the case of villain Dottie Dubloon and how she used dice to throw Odd Squad off.
Dog Hand. The team think Raven's supervillain father is the coolest.
Riding the Waves. Amethio meets Mighty G, and a surfing Gholdengo wows the Rising Volt Tacklers.

programmes.show_description: Crab Basket. Grizzy and the Lemmings discover a school of crabs that live in an underwater city.
On Trial. Do Rio and Etta have what it takes to be accepted into the Football Academy?
The Full Scale Invasion Badge. Tilda tries to make camp perfect for Ginny, while Ruby plots to get everyone sent home.
Terror in the Sky. Helmsworth divulges the truth about Switchblade.
Abby's Wild Kayak Adventure. Abby sets off on a sea kayaking adventure to spot some incredible wildlife!
